contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Document credential-profile QR + truesight_me beta/prod split
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/145
  
  Details:
  Documented the credential-profile QR code feature in agentic_ai_context so future AI sessions have the full picture when extending the credentialing platform.
  
  CREDENTIALING_PLATFORM.md updates:
  - §7 "What a CV renders" — QR is now listed as a header element (page + PDF), with the laptop-to-phone share rationale
  - §9 step 6 — added _cache/cv/<slug>.qr.png to the writeback list and the qr_code{path,target_url} block on the unified CV JSON; pointer to lineage-engine/scripts/qr_code.py + the TrueSight icon asset
  - §9 PDF visual design — embedded QR top-right of page 1 (28mm, float:right text wrap) so printed copies stay self-share
  - §12 Resolved-this-session — bullet noting the QR feature shipped 2026-05-16
  
  NOTES_truesight_me.md updates (related, since the QR work surfaced this gap):
  - Documented the beta vs. prod split that wasn't recorded anywhere: PRs land on truesight_me_beta (=beta.truesight.me); production truesight.me is served by a fork at truesight_me_prod and needs `gh repo sync` to promote
  - Flagged the pre-existing Visual Consistency Tests CI failure that's been broken since at least 2026-05-15 so future AIs don't misattribute it to their own PR
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/145
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
